## Diagram 2

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class ShipmentDatabase {
        +__init__(conn_name)
        +establish_connection()
        +get_cursor()
    }
    class organization_db {
        <<module>>
        +get_org_by_fv_id(cursor, fv_id)
    }
    class iam_lambdas {
        <<module>>
        +get_auth0_user_by_id(auth0_id)
        +user_has_organization_in_appmeta(user, org_id)
    }
    ShipmentDatabase --> organization_db : provides cursor to
    iam_lambdas --> ShipmentDatabase : reads user info (uses DB indirectly)
    organization_db <-- iam_lambdas : queries organization mapping
```
